steps.title: Recognize the function structure
steps.content: The function $f(x) = 5x + 7$ is linear, with form $f(x) = mx + b$. Here, 5 is the slope (rate of change per year) and 7 is the y-intercept (the value when $x = 0$).

steps.title: Apply the context
steps.content:
Since $x$ represents years after the tree height was first measured, $x = 0$ corresponds to the initial measurement time. At that moment:
$$f(0) = 5(0) + 7 = 7 \text{ feet}$$
The tree's estimated height was 7 feet when it was first measured. That confirms D is correct.
